'''wowafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wealdish|wealdish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wealdish|wealdish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wowafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wowafithi|wowafithi]] || [[word:wowafiji|wowafiji]] || [[word:wowafishi|wowafishi]] || [[word:wowafiki|wowafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wowafuthuthu|wowafuthuthu]] || [[word:wowafujuju|wowafujuju]] || [[word:wowafushushu|wowafushushu]] || [[word:wowafukuku|wowafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wowafuthu|wowafuthu]] || [[word:wowafuju|wowafuju]] || [[word:wowafushu|wowafushu]] || [[word:wowafuku|wowafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wowafufthuf|wowafufthuf]] || [[word:wowafufjuf|wowafufjuf]] || [[word:wowafufshuf|wowafufshuf]] || [[word:wowafufkuf|wowafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wowafethe|wowafethe]] || [[word:wowafeje|wowafeje]] || [[word:wowafeshe|wowafeshe]] || [[word:wowafeke|wowafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wowafothotho|wowafothotho]] || [[word:wowafojojo|wowafojojo]] || [[word:wowafoshosho|wowafoshosho]] || [[word:wowafokoko|wowafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wowafotho|wowafotho]] || [[word:wowafojo|wowafojo]] || [[word:wowafosho|wowafosho]] || [[word:wowafoko|wowafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wowafofthof|wowafofthof]] || [[word:wowafofjof|wowafofjof]] || [[word:wowafofshof|wowafofshof]] || [[word:wowafofkof|wowafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfthÃŸf|wowafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfjÃŸf|wowafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfshÃŸf|wowafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfkÃŸf|wowafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wowafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wowafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wowafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wowafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfthÃŸf|wowafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfjÃŸf|wowafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfshÃŸf|wowafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfkÃŸf|wowafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfthÃŸf|wowafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfjÃŸf|wowafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfshÃŸf|wowafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wowafÃŸfkÃŸf|wowafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wowafÃḊthÃḊ|wowafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wowafÃḊjÃḊ|wowafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wowafÃḊshÃḊ|wowafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wowafÃḊkÃḊ|wowafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wowafathatha|wowafathatha]] || [[word:wowafajaja|wowafajaja]] || [[word:wowafashasha|wowafashasha]] || [[word:wowafakaka|wowafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wowafatha|wowafatha]] || [[word:wowafaja|wowafaja]] || [[word:wowafasha|wowafasha]] || [[word:wowafaka|wowafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wowafafthaf|wowafafthaf]] || [[word:wowafafjaf|wowafafjaf]] || [[word:wowafafshaf|wowafafshaf]] || [[word:wowafafkaf|wowafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wowafasha|wowafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wowafshÃḋsha|wowafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wowafrosha|wowafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wowafmusha|wowafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wowafyasha|wowafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowowafnkshÃḋsha|gowowafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowowafnkrosha|gowowafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowowafnkmusha|gowowafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowowafnkyasha|gowowafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wowawafasha|wowawafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wowawafshÃḋsha|wowawafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wowawafrosha|wowawafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wowawafmusha|wowawafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wowawafyasha|wowawafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowowawafnkshÃḋsha|gowowawafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowowawafnkrosha|gowowawafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowowawafnkmusha|gowowawafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowowawafnkyasha|gowowawafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wewÃḊfasha|wewÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wewÃḊfshÃḋsha|wewÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wewÃḊfrosha|wewÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wewÃḊfmusha|wewÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wewÃḊfyasha|wewÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowewÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gowewÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowewÃḊfnkrosha|gowewÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowewÃḊfnkmusha|gowewÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowewÃḊfnkyasha|gowewÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wowfafasha|wowfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wowfafshÃḋsha|wowfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wowfafrosha|wowfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wowfafmusha|wowfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wowfafyasha|wowfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowowfafnkshÃḋsha|gowowfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowowfafnkrosha|gowowfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowowfafnkmusha|gowowfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowowfafnkyasha|gowowfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
